prompt: Create a premium minimalist beauty advertisement on a clean light gray studio background. Show a glamorous female model from chest up on the left side, with deep brunette hair blown dramatically to the left in a smooth, glossy wave, emphasizing shine and movement. She wears an elegant white halter dress with a twisted neckline. Her face is de-emphasized and not the focal point. On the right side, place a sleek modern cylindrical hair dryer in a metallic silver finish with a rose-gold circular rim around a black hollow center, shown upright with visible handle buttons, lower air vent perforations, and attached cord. Use luxury commercial product-photography lighting, soft shadows, ultra-clean retouching, and high-end cosmetic ad styling. Add bold modern sans-serif headline text in the upper right: Effortless shine. on the first line and Everyday perfection. below it in a lighter weight. In the lower left, include exactly 4 vertically stacked feature callouts with thin outlined circular icons and small sans-serif text: 1) sparkle icon with title "Fast drying." and body "Powerful digital motor for quick, efficient results." 2) thermometer icon with title "Heat intelligent." and body "Measures air temperature 40 times per second." 3) wavy heat lines icon with title "Designed for hair health." and body "Helps protect natural shine and smoothness." 4) muted speaker icon with title "Engineered for balance." and body "Lightweight, quiet, and comfortable to use." In the bottom right corner, add the luxury brand logo text LUXÉO with small uppercase "PROFESSIONAL" beneath it. Vertical poster layout, polished mobile ad aesthetic, aspirational beauty-tech branding, realistic hair texture, realistic skin, crisp typography, and premium editorial composition.
